title: SpecifiedCompetencyType
description: A specified competency is a reference to a particular competency at a specified level of proficiency.

typeCode.description: A code that identifes the type of competency: knowledge, skills, abilities, attitude and behavior.

evidenceRequiredIndicator.description: Indicates if evidence is required for the competency.

allowableCompetencyEvidenceTypeCodes.description: Array of competency evideence type codes. For example, 'assessment', 'degree', 'performance appraisal', etc.

requiredCompetencyEvidence.description: The essential compentencies required to perform the Job or Position.

proficiencyLevel.description: The proficiency level required for the competency.
